objective: Pull a client's organic SEO metrics for the last 7 months and summarize what's working — read-only, no changes.

data.text: Pull D'Amore Law's organic SEO metrics for the last 7 months and summarize. Read only.

data.arguments: sf data query --query "SELECT Name, Website FROM Account WHERE Name LIKE '%D''Amore%'"

data.output: D'Amore Law Group | damorelaw.com | PPC spend on file: $0

data.reply: D'Amore Law (damorelaw.com) — last 7 months, organic only: estimated organic traffic ~6,461 visits/mo across 1,204 ranking keywords, average position 12.4. No paid search spend detected ($0). Read-only pull; nothing was changed.

toolOutputs.output: Account: D'Amore Law Group | Website: damorelaw.com | PPC spend on file: $0
damorelaw.com 7-month organic estimate: organic_etv 6460.78; organic_keywords_count 1204; avg_position 12.4; paid_spend 0

finalAnswerText: D'Amore Law (damorelaw.com) — last 7 months, organic only: estimated organic traffic ~6,461 visits/mo across 1,204 ranking keywords, average position 12.4. No paid search spend detected ($0). Read-only pull; nothing was changed.
